name: 席拉
bio: 席拉，神秘的猫耳少女，以魔法与敏捷横扫战场。她的存在充满谜团，以幻术迷惑敌人，以速度制胜。
bio_en: Tessa, a mysterious cat-eared girl who sweeps the battlefield with magic and agility. Her existence is full of mystery.
story: 席拉，神秘的猫耳少女，以魔法与敏捷横扫战场。她的来历无人知晓，以幻术迷惑敌人，以速度制胜，是战场上最难以捉摸的存在之一。

skills.skill_description: 快速闪现至目标位置，留下幻影迷惑敌人。冷却20秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Quickly flash to the target position, leaving a phantom to confuse enemies. Cooldown: 20s.

skills.skill_description: 快速闪现至目标位置，可连续闪现两次。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Quickly flash to the target position, can flash twice consecutively. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 释放幻境领域，范围内敌人陷入幻觉，无法分辨真实目标。持续15秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Release an Illusion Domain, causing enemies within range to fall into illusions and unable to distinguish real targets. Duration: 15s. Rage limit: 75000.

skills.skill_description: 释放强化幻境领域，范围内敌人陷入幻觉，同时提升自身攻击力。持续15秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Release an enhanced Illusion Domain, causing enemies to fall into illusions while boosting own attack. Duration: 15s. Rage limit: 75000.
